title: French Meringue Crisp
description: A classic French dessert combining a crunchy meringue topping with a sweet and tangy crisp base.
instructions: Prepare the crisp base by mixing the sugar, flour, and butter in a bowl until crumbly.
Press the mixture into a 9x9-inch baking dish and bake for 20 minutes.
While the crisp is baking, prepare the meringue by whipping the French meringue with the vanilla extract until stiff peaks form.
Spread the meringue over the crisp base and return to the oven for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until the meringue is golden brown.
Remove the dessert from the oven and let it cool completely before serving.
